name: White Chip Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until fluffy.
3. Add the eggs and vanilla extract. Beat until light and fluffy.
4. Stir together the flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually beat the dry ingredients into the sugar mixture until well combined.
6. Stir in the white chips.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 8-9 minutes.
9. Allow to cool slightly on the pan before transferring to a wire rack.
10. Cool completely.
Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
